textByHash.0a805f0f2c04818bea853806ef70088c0b918d9e: Come back when you've got free space.
textByHash.1bafb38dbbf90631527cce51354d09241533329e: The spoils of wars are grand.
textByHash.2e68aa73849fafb2cbd89e1de3ab9e76fa09bda7: The rewards for the most loyal of this 'ouse are great. The 'onour to train alongside our elite guards and wear our prestigious armour, while also fightin' on the front line against the lizardman forces. The spoils of wars are
textByHash.415581694181620bfc4e03a2fdfdf64192551479: Oh, it doesn't matter. You don't understand. Go away.
textByHash.434483a958613c8294b56c4d395065091284663a: Well me luv', I've got some special rations for the soldiers in the fields ou'there; courtesy of the mainland Void Knights. Take a looksie.
textByHash.44fd4dd988ff3e7d3783b172db2452486ebb7431: It ain't all pretty 'ere, but if you 'elp our soldiers and tackle some organised crime... you'll soon find that the spoils o' war are grand.
textByHash.48805e910e98b4a8d434ffdbb60990e64515f4b0: Well I could give you some info if that's all yer wantin'. Gets lonely in 'ere while me mates are out there fightin' the good war!
textByHash.5451d6de08e038b18bd8cf1808d89a8755698bc9: Phwoar, what don' we do? This 'ouse is filled with officers and the like. Lead by our rig'rous leader Shiro Shayzien, 'e ensures ultimate justice and safety for the entirety of Great Kourend.
textByHash.5bd46e19b8c28425556de7593688e1a6332395e9: We should have known it was too good to be true.
textByHash.5cf17707d9481879b5eaa139dc40fccef5a8e8b0: Huh. So that's all you want. Here it is.
textByHash.68b95a6458cf59f8d865e400b5ae07f46d904168: The rewards for the most loyal of this 'ouse are great. The 'onour to train alongside our elite guards and wear our prestigious armour, while also fightin' on the front line against the lizardman forces.
textByHash.755e8094de417f066ebd46f81e02d3651fbccdf0: You ought to get to your place in the circle. Denath wants YOU to lead the ritual.
textByHash.8c4bffa170b06d4e78c0971c5df3c9d494718655: It's always the same, everyone want to use you. Even demons.
textByHash.ab98bbd9a423ba6f727f529b0bf3a00ce011c014: That's alright petal, you go'un and have fun.
textByHash.afd3e50f50320fa287ddc51c031c7cf4e58722d4: You ought to get to the head of the circle and lead the incantation. Let's get this over with.
textByHash.cc4f9b0690109a1cb20acb4553ee2ffcc0b709e0: I already gave that to you! Go away!
textByHash.ce873b766a9ca3eccb1410edd2bfb425e833b8a0: Well ye canne remember everything I 'ave to say about this wee 'ouse without that, can you? Come back when yer 'ead's not all fried!
textByHash.d79a5468b836ca24c697cef171b3108b91cc2fd8: Phwoar, what don' we do? This place is filled with officers and the like. Lead by our rig'rous leader Shiro Shayzien, 'e ensures ultimate justice and safety for the entirety of Great Kourend.
textByHash.d8eca821d40654f7f9efdb1b38bbd3e3e7a8d73d: Our soldiers fight off the constant threat of the lizardman, while our 'ighly trained medics 'eal them from battle. Strict in combat trainin' and discipline. Law, order and defence. These are the words we live by!
textByHash.e5c5c1d92468035031fe574cb13f135ab2c99860: What're yer looking for, me luv'?
textByHash.ed6446d696e83d5d11336ff0ed52472dc8925fe5: Don't get us wrong, me luv', it ain't all pretty. Those who're lookin' to gain favour within this household need to 'elp in 'ealing our fallen soldiers and tackling organised crime... It's 'ard work! That bein' said...
